hero.name: Juki Sadikin
hero.description: Crafting modern web experiences with clean UI, smooth performance, and real-world impact.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I am a Full Stack Developer focused on building scalable, high-performance web applications. I enjoy transforming complex ideas into clean and intuitive digital solutions, from user interfaces to the systems behind them. I also have experience developing web applications and interactive educational games.
